calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Arbitration Order to Show Cause.
Appearances: Mr. Joseph Bravo, Esq. for Planitiff Lyllian Morales.
No Appearance by Defendants Kim Chi Nguyen, et al.

Mr. Bravo, counsel for the Plaintiff, advises the Court that this matter has settled. A Notice of Settlement was filed on 6-12-2012. The Court orders this matter set on the Order to Show Cause re Dismissal Calendar pursuant to CRC 3.1385 for 8-14-2012 at 2:00 pm in Department 610.

Visiting Judge Wallace Douglas (Retired), Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (610)
